description_long: This is a countertop electric mixer with a robust, streamlined body finished in white and black. The main chassis is smooth and rounded, supporting a large, detachable black mixing bowl beneath a fixed mixing head. The head features a metallic whisk attachment and a visible control panel with numbered speed settings on one side. The brand name 'ATMA' is clearly printed on the side of the head, and the overall design is both functional and modern. The base is wide and stable, ensuring the mixer remains steady during operation. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metal components for the whisk and internal mechanisms.
description: A modern white and black countertop electric mixer with a large black bowl, metallic whisk, and visible speed controls.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'ATMA' logo, the full profile of the mixer, and the bowl attached beneath the mixing head.
description_view_1: Rear-angled view highlighting the rounded back of the mixer and a clear look into the open bowl and whisk attachment.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the numbered speed control panel and the bowl's attachment to the base.
description_view_3: Back view showing the mixer’s wide, stable base and the rear of the mixing head, with the bowl partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo 'ATMA' is visible on the side of the mixing head in black lettering.
attribute_control_panel_type: Analog dial with numbered speed settings (1-5) on the side of the head.
attribute_chassis_design: enclosed body with a wide, stable base and a streamlined, modern profile
